item.title: Petrobras strikes pre-salt oil in ultra-deepwater Campos basin well
item.description: Ruba prospect was drilled in the eastern portion of Campos in nearly 3000 metres of water

item.title: Perenco to progress development of mature assets in Trinidad & Tobago
item.description: Company last year concluded acquisition of two blocks from Woodside Energy

item.title: Halliburton wins multibillion-dollar contract for Vaca Muerta development
item.description: Argentina's YPF is leading development in the world's second-largest shale play

item.title: TotalEnergies hits 160-metre hydrocarbon column in Congo-Brazzaville exploration well
item.description: New development on cards after drilling success in Moho area

item.title: Offshore driller to resume operations for several rigs in the Middle East
item.description: Driller shares update on planned resumption of activities in Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates and Qatar

item.title: BP makes bold move as it dives into Namibia frontier play
item.description: Supermajor strikes deal with Eco Atlantic to take stakes in Walvis basin acreage

item.title: Saudis restore oil supplies at pipeline and offshore field affected by Iran attacks
item.description: Iran has attacked several oil and gas facilities in the Middle East since the conflict started on 28 February, crippling regional energy infrastructure

item.title: Oman offers five oil and gas exploration blocks with 'significant potential'
item.description: Latest bid round comprises concession areas 12, 16, 55, 42 and 45

item.title: Brent tops $100 on US threat to block Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Centcom said it would implement a blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports at 10.00 ET (14.00 GMT) on 13 April

item.title: Brent tops $100 on US threat to block Iran's ports
item.description: US Centcom said it would implement a blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports at 10.00 ET (14.00 GMT) on 13 April

item.title: National gas pipeline operators agree to link hydrogen networks
item.description: Connecting point will be developed using repurposed gas pipelines where possible

item.title: Strike action a real possibility at key Australia LNG project
item.description: Industry union files for protected industrial action at Japanese operator’s Ichthys facilities

item.title: Santos to return to Australia shale play this year
item.description: Operator aims to take FID on onshore project by early 2029

item.title: SinoOcean to sell unfinisheds drillships to clear idle offshore assets
item.description: Chinese contractor has revived more than 90% of the 173 abandoned rigs it inherited in 2019

item.title: SinoOcean to sell unfinished drillships to clear idle offshore assets
item.description: Chinese contractor has revived more than 90% of the 173 abandoned rigs it inherited in 2019

item.title: Brazilian driller wins another rig contract extension with Petrobras
item.description: Charter renewal will add $29 million in contract backlog

item.title: Petrobras signs contract with Petronas for stake in two Brazil fields
item.description: Deal will restore Petrobras' stake in Tartaruga Verde and Espadarte Module III to 100%

item.title: ExxonMobil eyes $24 billion spend on Nigeria deepwater projects
item.description: US supermajor eyes FPSO for 27-year-old discovery, and billion-barrel subsea tieback

item.title: OMV selects its first female chief executive
item.description: Emma Delaney has served on BP's executive team for six years

item.title: African Energy Chamber intervenes in critical climate court case
item.description: Lobby group to offer support for energy industry in landmark legal proceedings in Tanzania

item.title: Have your say - Upstream reader survey
item.description: Share your views and help Upstream improve

item.title: Aramco and TotalEnergies shut down 465,000 bpd refinery after attack
item.description: TotalEnergies noted that oil production in Iraq, Qatar and the UAE has been hit by the Iran war

item.title: From predictive to prescriptive: Equinor eyes next steps for AI
item.description: After delivering with predictive maintenance and seismic data crunching, Equinor seeks to move into agentic artificial intelligence

item.title: Saudi Arabia says oil production capacity cut, pipeline flows hit amid attack on its facilities
item.description: Iran has attacked several regional oil and gas facilities since the Middle East conflict started in late February, crippling the regional energy infrastructure

item.title: Adnoc chief says Strait of Hormuz is still shut, calls for ‘unconditional’ opening
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran, subject to reopening the strategic waterway through which around 20% of global oil and LNG transits

item.title: Adnoc chief says Strait of Hormuz is still shut and calls for ‘unconditional’ opening
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran, subject to reopening the strategic waterway through which around 20% of global oil and LNG transits

item.title: French engineer wins landmark contract for China LNG project
item.description: Onshore storage tank will be equipped with GTT’s membrane technology

item.title: Oil rises as Israel seeks peace talks with Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Brent, WTI leap as Strait of Hormuz remains clogged

item.title: Subsea7 wins $1.25 billion-plus pre-salt contract with Petrobras
item.description: Company will provide SURF solution for the Sepia-2 project offshore Brazil

item.title: Petrobras, BP and Cheniere top this week's leading oil and gas appointments
